apply.comment: Button user presses to apply unsaved changes in UI

clear.comment: Button the user clicks to clear a field or a filtered selection

close.comment: Button the user clicks to close a dialog or a panel

create.comment: Button the user clicks to create an entity in the system

ok.comment: Button the user clicks to apply changes or to apply an action, usually used in dialogs

cancel.comment: Button the user clicks to undo or discard changes or an action
